info.description: URL redirects written to the Netlify _redirects file at build time

fromPath.description: Source path, must start with / (e.g. /old-page). Supports Netlify placeholders like /blog/:slug and splats like /news/*

toPath.description: Destination path or absolute URL (e.g. /new-page or https://example.com). Use :slug or :splat to carry over placeholders
